purpose: Diagnostics-only supplement that adds unambiguous partially_supported local Atomic Claims. It does not replace or rebalance the frozen 16-case Candidate control set and must not be used as held-out capability evidence.

evidence.text: Pilot teams A, B, and C completed the task faster after the workflow change.
Pilot team D showed no measurable change in completion time.

control_cases.candidate_text: The pilot teams completed the task faster after the workflow change.

claims.claim_text: The pilot teams completed the task faster after the workflow change.

evidence.text: Two early-stage startups in one accelerator reduced rework after weekly customer interviews.

control_cases.candidate_text: Early-stage startups generally reduce rework through weekly customer interviews.

claims.claim_text: Early-stage startups generally reduce rework through weekly customer interviews.

evidence.text: Teams using smaller batches received feedback sooner, but those teams also had dedicated reviewers.

control_cases.candidate_text: Smaller batch size caused the teams to receive feedback sooner.

claims.claim_text: Smaller batch size caused the teams to receive feedback sooner.

evidence.text: In two prior canary deployments, rollback remained isolated to the canary cohort.

control_cases.candidate_text: The next canary deployment will keep any rollback isolated to the canary cohort.

claims.claim_text: The next canary deployment will keep any rollback isolated to the canary cohort.
